name: dokki-mcp
description: Dokki — agent-native collaboration OS. Connects Codex to your Dokki workspace's hosted MCP (facade surface): documents, tables, artifacts, files, search, publishing, and 1000+ external integrations.

interface.shortDescription: Where people and agents create knowledge together — in Codex.
interface.longDescription: Dokki is the workspace where AI agents work like teammates — reading, writing, reviewing, and publishing alongside people through MCP and real-time collaborative documents. This plugin connects Codex to Dokki's hosted MCP facade: 8 high-level tools (instead of ~37 flat ones, so Codex picks the right tool and spends fewer tokens) covering documents, tables, artifacts, file upload/download, semantic + exact search, public-site publishing with custom domains, and a `connect` tool that authorizes and runs 1000+ external integrations (GitHub, Slack, Gmail, Notion, Google Workspace, Linear, …) — all through Dokki. Codex uses Dokki OAuth during installation so you choose the Personal and Org workspaces this plugin may access.
defaultPrompt: Write a Dokki doc and publish it to our docs site.
Pull my open GitHub issues into a Dokki table.
